section_miscategorizations.text: She reports chills but no fever.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the history rather than the objective findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports right upper quadrant tenderness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an exam/symptom finding and not an intervention, order, or instruction, so it should not appear in the plan.
